boundary_binding.action_boundary: May operations activate the production device group?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: The source documents confirm GD-4, Site P2, RC-12, activation date 2026-06-28, and current QA-approved CP-77. However, STD-GAC-087-P explicitly requires 'calibration-status class' verification before activation. CAL-GAC-087 confirms the calibration pack is current but does not explicitly verify the 'calibration-status class' category. WARN-GAC-087 reinforces the need for explicit calibration status verification. The '082-style status-class trap' unresolved dependency indicates this exact verification requirement remains unconfirmed by exact source record.
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: STD-GAC-087-P requires calibration authority to match device group, production site, release condition, activation date, AND calibration-status class before activation. CAL-GAC-087 confirms four of five requirements; calibration-status class verification is unconfirmed by explicit source record.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: The policy requires explicit calibration-status class verification. While CP-77 implicitly covers current calibration status, no source document explicitly states 'calibration-status class' verification is complete. This narrow source-record defect prevents definitive ALLOW.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: Timing (2026-06-28), scope (GD-4, P2, RC-12), and authority (CAL-GAC-087) are verified. The dependency 'calibration-status class' verification is not explicitly confirmed by source records, leaving the timing/scope/authority/dependency section incomplete per policy requirements.

critical_features_preserved: Device group, site, and release condition verification
Deterministic gate criteria for unresolved dependencies
final_answer: The action cannot proceed to execution. While GD-4, Site P2, RC-12, activation date 2026-06-28, and current QA-approved calibration pack CP-77 are confirmed, STD-GAC-087-P explicitly requires calibration-status class verification before activation. CAL-GAC-087 does not explicitly confirm calibration-status class. The 082-style status-class trap remains unresolved; source records must explicitly verify this abstract class requirement before the action boundary can be considered closed.
open_blockers: Calibration-status class verification not explicitly confirmed by source records per STD-GAC-087-P policy requirement.
